description: SPECTROMETER modeled as Lock
CENTRIFUGE modeled as Lock
FUME_HOOD modeled as Lock
channel from CHEMIST to BIOLOGIST for compound sample
channel from BIOLOGIST to ANALYST for test results
channel from ANALYST to CHEMIST for quality report
channel from CHEMIST to QC_CONTROLLER for purification data
channel from BIOLOGIST to QC_CONTROLLER for bioassay data
channel from QC_CONTROLLER to CHEMIST for verification result
channel from QC_CONTROLLER to BIOLOGIST for verification result
CHEMIST must synthesize before analyzing
BIOLOGIST runs bioassay only after receiving compound from CHEMIST
ANALYST analyzes only after receiving test results from BIOLOGIST
CHEMIST final validation only after QC_CONTROLLER approval
run_analysis requires SPECTROMETER
run_separation requires CENTRIFUGE
run_synthesis requires FUME_HOOD
QC_CONTROLLER verification requires both FUME_HOOD and SPECTROMETER
bioassay can pass or fail — BIOLOGIST must redo if it fails
QC_CONTROLLER can approve or reject CHEMIST's purification data
QC_CONTROLLER can approve or reject BIOLOGIST's bioassay data
synthesis can pass or fail
CHEMIST (spec->cent) and BIOLOGIST (cent->spec) use instruments in opposite order
QC_CONTROLLER needs FUME_HOOD + SPECTROMETER simultaneously -- hold-and-wait if another scientist holds one
QC_CONTROLLER rejection forces scientist to re-acquire instruments, creating additional contention rounds
QC_CONTROLLER receives verification requests from CHEMIST and BIOLOGIST in either order
all four scientists can start working concurrently
